hero_subtitle: Be heard. Shape the future of India.
status_registered_desc: Your name is on the electoral roll.
status_not_registered_desc: Fill in your voter details to access your voter slip.
alert_body: Phase 1 voting starts on April 19th. Check your details now.
election_type_desc: 18th Lok Sabha general elections across 543 parliamentary constituencies.
manifesto_desc: AI-extracted key promises from top parties in your constituency.
live_to_avoid: to avoid the heat and rush.
volunteer_desc: Join LokMat as a volunteer. Your participation ensures a smooth, transparent, and inclusive electoral process for every citizen.
volunteer_roles_desc: Choose how you want to serve. All roles require attending a brief orientation session.
volunteer_observer_desc: Monitor polling activities from outside the booth to ensure civic compliance and report any irregularities securely.
volunteer_awareness_desc: Engage with your local community to educate citizens about their voting rights, schedules, and necessary documents.
volunteer_transport_desc: Assist elderly, disabled, or distant voters in safely reaching the polling booth and returning home.
volunteer_doc_desc: Help voters check their names on the electoral roll and verify their identity documents before they enter the queue.
sos_desc: If you are witnessing illegal activities, experiencing threats, or facing critical technical issues at a polling booth, seek immediate help below.
sos_file_report_desc: Select a category below to securely submit evidence or a formal complaint to the returning officer.
sos_coercion_desc: Intimidation, bribery, or preventing legitimate voters.
sos_capture_desc: Unauthorized control or tampering at the polling station.
sos_malfunction_desc: EVM/VVPAT failure or extended power outages.
sos_complaint_desc: Missing names, lack of basic facilities, or misbehavior.
sos_secure_desc: Reports submitted through this portal are directly monitored by the Central Control Room. Your identity can remain anonymous if requested.
ai_greeting: Namaste! 🙏 I'm VoteSathi AI — your smart election process assistant. Ask me anything about voting, candidates, booths, or your rights!
election_upcoming_desc: Complete schedule of elections from 2024 to 2028
election_lok_sabha_desc: The Lok Sabha is the lower house of India's Parliament. It has 543 elected members who represent parliamentary constituencies across India. Members are elected by direct vote for a 5-year term. The party or coalition with a majority forms the central government and selects the Prime Minister.
election_vidhan_sabha_desc: The Vidhan Sabha is the legislative body of each state and union territory. The number of seats varies by state (e.g., UP has 403, Goa has 40). Members are elected by direct vote for a 5-year term. The majority party forms the state government and selects the Chief Minister.
